copy.legal_privacy_html:
Last updated: January 2026. This policy describes how SPANGLE Architecture & Interior Design Studio and SPANGLE Architecture & Interior Design Studio (“we”) handle information when you use this website or contact us.

Information we collect

When you submit an enquiry through our website contact form, we collect the details you provide (such as your name, email address, phone number if given, project type if given, and message). Each submission is stored securely on our server and a notification is emailed to our studio team so we can respond. If you contact us directly by email or phone, we receive the information you choose to share.

How we use it

We use contact information only to respond to enquiries, prepare proposals, and manage projects. We do not sell personal data.

Retention

Enquiry records are kept for as long as needed to fulfil our contract and legal obligations, then deleted or anonymised according to our internal policy.

Your rights

Depending on applicable law, you may request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data. Contact hello@spangle.studio.

Changes

We may update this page periodically. Continued use of the site after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
copy.legal_terms_html:
By using this website you agree to these terms. Content, images, and text are owned by SPANGLE Architecture & Interior Design Studio unless otherwise credited.

Information on this site is for general guidance and does not constitute a contract until agreed in writing. We reserve the right to update these terms at any time.

home.heroLead: Architecture and interior design for discerning homes, workplaces, and retail — conceived with rigour, finished with quiet luxury.
home.aboutLeadHtml:
SPANGLE Architecture & Interior Design Studio is a full-service studio for architecture, interiors, and delivery. We work from first sketch through site administration — one accountable team, aligned incentives, and drawings that contractors can actually build.

Our work favours honest materials, generous daylight, and envelopes tuned for Gujarat’s climate. The result feels calm, durable, and unmistakably yours.
home.aboutImageAlt: SPANGLE Architecture & Interior Design Studio interior project · Rajkot
home.galleryIntro: A curated library of interiors, architecture, and 3D visualisations from recent Archevo commissions across Gujarat.
home.projectsIntro: Explore client projects — each album opens a full visual case study.
home.capabilitiesIntro: From foundation to finish — structural expertise, compliant approvals, interiors, and one-point project management.
home.processTitle: How we move from brief to keys
home.processIntro: Clear phases, shared tools, and sign-off moments — so you always know what happens next.
home.ctaLead: Share your site, timeline, and ambitions — we respond with a clear path and indicative scope.

testimonials.quote: “Our living and bedroom layouts were planned practically. The team was on site when it mattered and handover was smooth.”
“3D views and drawings helped us decide finishes before work started. Plan-related queries were handled without us chasing offices.”
“Plot layout and front elevation matched what we discussed. One studio for design and coordination through construction.”
“Interior detailing and civil work moved in step. We always knew who to call and what was happening next.”

team.name: Jay Rathod
team.bio: Leads project direction, client relationships, and overall delivery for Archevo Infra Edge across Gujarat.

team.name: Kishan Tank
team.bio: Oversees design, interiors, and site coordination — from drawings and 3D through execution.

team.name: Jignesh Sekhva
team.bio: Technical drawings, structural coordination, and on-site engineering support for civil and approval work.

processSteps.description: Styling, documentation, and photography — space ready to live in.

servicesHome.title: Plan sanctioning & approvals
servicesHome.shortDescription: Architectural drawings, authority liaison, and regulatory compliance.
servicesHome.detailLead1: Architectural drawing preparation and documentation aligned to your plot and programme.
servicesHome.detailLead2: Liaison with municipal and town-planning authorities; compliance with local development control rules.

servicesHome.title: Interior design & execution
servicesHome.shortDescription: Space planning, 3D visuals, materials, and turnkey interior delivery.
servicesHome.detailLead1: Space planning, 3D visualization, material selection, lighting, false ceiling, and wall finishes.
servicesHome.detailLead2: Modular furniture, joinery, and turnkey interior project delivery — documented for site.

servicesHome.title: Civil construction
servicesHome.shortDescription: Residential and commercial structure execution across Gujarat.
servicesHome.detailLead1: Residential and commercial structure execution with disciplined site supervision.
servicesHome.detailLead2: RCC work, brick masonry, plastering, waterproofing, and coordinated MEP interfaces.

servicesHome.title: Turnkey project management
servicesHome.shortDescription: From design brief to handover — one point of contact.
servicesHome.detailLead1: From design brief to handover: procurement, labour management, and vendor coordination.
servicesHome.detailLead2: A single accountable team for design, approvals, build, and interior completion.

servicesHome.title: Consulting civil engineering
servicesHome.shortDescription: Structural advice, site feasibility, and buildability reviews.
servicesHome.detailLead1: Structural and civil engineering consultation for new builds and renovations.
servicesHome.detailLead2: Feasibility studies, BOQs, and coordination with architects and contractors.

servicesHome.title: Building plan & NA layouts
servicesHome.shortDescription: Plan approval support, layouts, and land survey.
servicesHome.detailLead1: Building plan approval pathways and documentation for residential and commercial plots.
servicesHome.detailLead2: NA layouts, land survey, and plot planning support across Gujarat.

servicesHome.title: 3D design & visualization
servicesHome.shortDescription: Concept renders and presentation models for client sign-off.
servicesHome.detailLead1: Photorealistic 3D renders and walkthroughs for architecture and interior schemes.
servicesHome.detailLead2: Material and lighting studies before work starts on site — fewer surprises at execution.

studio.title: SPANGLE Architecture & Interior Design Studio
studio.lead: Integrated design and build — civil engineering, plan approvals, interiors, and turnkey project management from Rajkot.
studio.philosophyTitle: From design vision to built reality
studio.philosophyLead1: SPANGLE Architecture & Interior Design Studio offers end-to-end services across civil engineering, plan sanctioning, interior design, and turnkey project management — one accountable team for homes, workplaces, and developments in Gujarat.
studio.philosophyLead2: We execute with integrity, intelligence, and innovation — coordinating authorities, contractors, and vendors so you have a single point of contact from drawing board to keys.
studio.valuesHtml:
Rajkot & Saurashtra

On-ground experience across Gujarat — not a distant design-only studio.

Approvals support

Drawings and submissions prepared for local plan-sanctioning requirements.

Referral-led work

A large share of new projects come from past clients and word of mouth.

Turnkey under one roof

Design, civil, and interiors coordinated by one accountable team.
studio.pullquote: From design vision to built reality — we execute with integrity, intelligence, and innovation.

work.title: Selected work
work.lead: Residential, commercial, and retail — conceived as one coherent story from street to detail.

contact.heroLead: Tell us about your site, timeline, and ambitions. We respond within two business days with next steps.

process.title: Clarity at every milestone
process.lead: You always know where we are in the journey — what decisions are due, what we need from you, and what happens next on site.
process.splitLeadHtml:
We structure every commission in clear phases with sign-off moments — so scope, cost, and calendar stay visible.

On site, our project directors hold weekly coordination meetings with contractors and vendors until handover is complete.
process.splitLead1: We structure every commission in clear phases with sign-off moments — so scope, cost, and calendar stay visible.
process.splitLead2: On site, our project directors hold weekly coordination meetings with contractors and vendors until handover is complete.

journal.title: Ideas from the studio
journal.lead: Notes on materiality, process, and the culture of space — for clients and collaborators.

services.title: Integrated design & build solutions
services.lead: At SPANGLE Architecture & Interior Design Studio, we blend structural expertise with aesthetic precision — functional, compliant, and beautifully designed spaces from brief to handover.
